intended_use_full: Quantib Prostate is image post-processing software that provides the user with processing, visualization, and editing of prostate MRI images. The software facilitates the analysis and study review of MR data sets and provides additional mathematical and/or statistical analysis. Quantib Prostate functionality includes registered multiparametric-MRI viewing, with the option to view images combined into a single image to support visualization. The software can be used for semi-automatic segmentation of anatomical structures and provides volume computations, together with tools for manual editing. PI-RADS scoring is possible using a structured workflow. Quantib Prostate is intended to be used by trained medical professionals and provides information that, in a clinical setting, may assist in the interpretation of prostate MR studies. Diagnosis should not be made solely based on the analysis performed using Quantib Prostate.
ground_truth: Manual prostate sub-region segmentation by radiologists
other_metrics: Dice overlap and Mean Surface Distance reported for sub-region segmentation algorithm performance; inter-observer measurements used for statistical comparison; radiologists scored sub-regions and ROI localizations on 5-point Likert scale judged to be of high quality
